channel.title: Hi-Lo Liquor Market — Long Beach Events
channel.description: Upcoming tastings, pop-ups, and events at Hi-Lo Liquor Market (Long Beach).

item.title: Food Pop-Up: WAVE Gourmet Burgers
item.description:
When: May 22 5:00 PM - 9:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

WAVE is bringing their legendary smash burgers and crave-worthy truffle fries to the party!

item.title: Free Tasting: Ovo Vodka + More
item.description:
When: May 22 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join for a complimentary tasting with this gorgeous vodka…plus more (TBA).

item.title: Free Tasting: Pinhook Bourbon & Rye
item.description:
When: May 21 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a tasting with Pinhook Kentucky straight bourbon whiskey.

item.title: Hi-Lo Long Beach: King Trivia
item.description:
When: May 20 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us at our Long Beach location every Wednesday night for trivia! If you're a pop-culture buff, this is the night for you!

item.title: Free Tasting: Old G Gin
item.description:
When: May 16 1:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting with Old G Gin, a London dry style gin made in the traditional method without preservatives!

item.title: Free Tasting: Meet the Brewer – Ikasu Brewing
item.description:
When: May 15 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a special event…Masahiro Kitano, the founder and brewmaster at Ikasu Brewing, will be in store sampling and talking about his beers!

item.title: Free Tasting: Sylva N/A Aged Spirits
item.description:
When: May 14 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting of this unique new entry into the n/a realm. Sylva is the world's first maturation lab making aged non-alcoholic spirits from forest to glass.

item.title: Free Tasting: Shelter Distilling
item.description:
When: May 14 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting with Shelter Distilling!

item.title: Free Tasting: Mommenpop Aperitif
item.description:
When: May 14 3:30 PM - 6:30 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting with Free Mommenpop Aperitif!

item.title: Free Tasting: Neft Vodka
item.description:
When: May 13 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting of Neft Vodka.

item.title: Bloom & Hue Flower Pop-Up for Mother's Day
item.description:
When: May 10 1:00 PM - 5:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Treat your mom by stopping by to pick up a bouquet and wine! 💐 🍷

item.title: Free Tasting: Dulan Wine
item.description:
When: May 10 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting with Dulan Wines! Old vine Zinfandel and Chenin Blanc from their family vineyard. These wines would make the perfect gift for mom!

item.title: Free Tasting: Togroni's Negroni Cocktails
item.description:
When: May 9 4:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting with Togroni's Negroni Cocktails!

item.title: Free Tasting: La Tierra De Acre Mezcal
item.description:
When: May 2 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Come sample this fresh mezcal from the foothills of San Jose del Cabo.

item.title: Free Tasting: Fiero Tequila
item.description:
When: May 2 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting with Fiero Tequila, the spiciest infused tequila! It's additive-free & naturally infused!

item.title: Free Tasting: Soto Sake
item.description:
When: May 2 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Come join us for a free sample of Soto Sake. Soto means 'outside' in Japanese, and these junmai sakes are a celebration of nature's purest elements.

item.title: Free Tasting: Madre Mezcal & Tequila
item.description:
When: May 1 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Madre is an artisanal mezcal, made by hand in the rolling hills of the Oaxacan Sierra. Come by and try their Ensamble, Espadín, and tequila!

item.title: Free Tasting: Banhez Mezcal, Libelula Tequila & Combier Liqueur
item.description:
When: Apr 30 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

In the lead up to Cinco de Mayo, come sample three amazing products that will elevate your celebrations…plus free cocktail cards and Libelula cocktail shakers will be handed out.

item.title: Free Tasting: Vivy cocktails
item.description:
When: Apr 29 3:30 PM - 6:30 PM

Where: Long Beach

The no-glass cocktail in a sippable pouch that’s beach-friendly, pool-friendly and boat-friendly.

item.title: Free Tasting: 9 North Rum
item.description:
When: Apr 24 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting with 9 North Rum! 9 North is an innovative super-premium rum brand that captivates the palates of sophisticated consumers.

item.title: Free Tasting: Veranda Craft Cocktails
item.description:
When: Apr 23 4:00 PM - 8:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting with Veranda canned cocktails!

item.title: Food Pop-Up: Antonio’s Paella
item.description:
When: Apr 19 5:00 PM - 8:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Come eat some delicious Paella from Antonio's! Perfect to pair with a glass of wine or crispy pint!

item.title: Free Tasting: Engine Organic Gin
item.description:
When: Apr 11 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting with Engine Organic Gin, handmade in Italy!

item.title: Free Tasting: Luxardo Liqueurs
item.description:
When: Apr 10 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Come by and sample some incredible offerings from Luxardo Liqueurs!

item.title: Free Tasting: Nikka Spirits
item.description:
When: Apr 10 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Come by and try craft spirits from Nikka!

item.title: Food Pop-Up: Say No More LBC
item.description:
When: Apr 9 5:00 PM - 8:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Say No More LBC will be popping up out front serving delicious grilled meats!

item.title: Food Pop-Up: Tacos Tekila
item.description:
When: Mar 29 5:00 PM - 8:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Tacos Tekila will be serving their mouth watering tacos and quesadillas. You can choose from Carne Asada, Al Pastor, Chorizo, or Pollo!

item.title: Free Tasting: Sipwell Canned Wine
item.description:
When: Mar 28 5:00 PM - 8:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Sipwell Wine Company is premium California wine with a can-do spirit. A female-founded and Black-owned company, they make award-winning canned wine that’s a little bit of a renegade. Sipwell sparkling wines are naturally can-conditioned, are fermented dry, meaning they have 0g sugar, and are sourced from organic or sustainably farmed grapes in California's Central Coast. These single-serve aluminum cans are infinitely recyclable, portable, and perfect for celebrating life's little moments.

item.title: Free Tasting: Anytime Spritz + Farmhouse Organic Spirits
item.description:
When: Mar 28 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Anytime Spritz makes organic and regenerative spirits & cocktails. Crafted by queer women, powered by farmers and the first climate negative distillery.

item.title: Free Tasting: Kastra Elion Vodka
item.description:
When: Mar 28 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Family-owned and artisan-crafted in Greece, Kastra Elion is the original premium sipping vodka distilled from Greek olives. This premium vodka has unparalleled smoothness and timeless sophistication. Come get a taste of the Mediterranean with this free tasting!

item.title: Free Tasting: Yebiga Rakija
item.description:
When: Mar 26 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Come sample this unique and delicious Serbian Plum Brandy. Yebiga Rakija is an exceptional , handcrafted and 100% natural Sljivovica, a fruit brandy from central central Serbia.

item.title: Free Tasting: Agua Del Sol Mezcal
item.description:
When: Mar 21 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting with Agua Del Sol Mezcal!

item.title: Free Tasting: North Coast Brewing
item.description:
When: Mar 20 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting with North Coast Brewing!

item.title: Free Tasting: Societe Brewing
item.description:
When: Mar 19 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Come sample some incredible beers from this stalwart San Diego brewery.

item.title: Free Tasting: Salt Point Canned Cocktails
item.description:
When: Mar 18 3:30 PM - 6:30 PM

Where: Long Beach

Salt Point has been crafting premium canned cocktails with all-natural ingredients along the coast of Northern California since 2013. Right here to be exact: 38.0834° N, 122.7633° W. Everyone at Salt Point is committed to quality ingredients and the finest of spirits. Though things can get a little foggy around there, they're clear about this: less is more. That’s why they keep the ingredients to a minimum and prefer to sail by the stars. So whether you’re hanging with old friends or interesting strangers, Salt Point invites you to kick back and raise a can. Come on in and give Salt Point a try with this free tasting of their premium canned drinks!

item.title: Free Tasting: Writer's Tears Irish Whiskey
item.description:
When: Mar 15 3:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting of Writers Tears Irish Whiskey

item.title: Free Tasting: Golden Rule Canned Cocktails
item.description:
When: Mar 14 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Golden Rule's drinks are top-shelf, bar-strength destination cocktails in convenient 100ml cans so that you can sip, savor, and enjoy wherever the day or night takes you. Come by and try their delicious, quality canned cocktails including The Margarita, Old Fashioned, and Espresso Martini!

item.title: Free Tasting: Lodestar Whiskey
item.description:
When: Mar 13 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting with Lodestar whiskey!

item.title: Free Tasting: Breakthru
item.description:
When: Mar 13 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Jeff from Breakthru will be tasting through some sparkling wines and white wines from their portfolio!

item.title: Free Tasting: Jiant Hard Kombucha & Tea
item.description:
When: Mar 11 3:30 PM - 6:30 PM

Where: Long Beach

Come by and try the clean, crisp, and refreshing hard kombuchas and hard teas from Jiant, which are crafted with fresh-brewed organic teas, botanicals and real fruit.

item.title: Free Tasting: Kolfok Wines
item.description:
When: Mar 5 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

We'll be sampling through 3 wines by Kolfolk. Winemaker, Stefan Wellanschitz is a natura wine maker in Austria in the Ödenburger Valley. He wants to avoid monoculture and prefers the grapes grow naturally together and whatever else might sprout up in between such as flowers and herbs. These wine are super fun and delicious!

item.title: Free Tasting: Via Carota Cocktails
item.description:
When: Feb 26 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a Free Tasting with Via Carota Craft Cocktails!

item.title: Free Tasting: Precis Vodka
item.description:
When: Feb 19 3:30 PM - 6:30 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting with Precis Vodka.

item.title: Free Tasting: Mas Vino x Wonderwerk Wines
item.description:
When: Feb 11 3:30 PM - 6:30 PM

Where: Long Beach

With Valentine's Day right around the corner, come enjoy a free tasting of fun wines from Wonderwerk & Mas Vino: Chismosa & Como La Flor. Get in the mood for love with these inventive wines!

item.title: Free Tasting: MadeWest Brewing
item.description:
When: Jan 30 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting of the delicious beers from MadeWest Brewing!

item.title: Beer Tasting: Topo Chico Hard Seltzer
item.description:
When: Jan 30 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Come join us to sample some flavorful hard seltzers from Topo Chico!

item.title: Free Tasting: Parch NA Cocktails
item.description:
When: Jan 29 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting with Parch! They specialize in agave based NA cocktails.

item.title: Free Tasting: Tost
item.description:
When: Jan 23 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting with Tost, an NA tea based drink.

item.title: Free Tasting: Vala Lifestyle Seltzer
item.description:
When: Jan 22 3:30 PM - 6:30 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting Vala Seltzer, they're a low abv lifestyle seltzer that's low cal and sugar-free. We'll be sampling Cucumber mint and Yuzu Lemon.

item.title: Free Tasting: Manly Spirits
item.description:
When: Jan 15 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Come try a sample of Manly Spirits pink martini or NA pink martini!

item.title: Free Tasting: Soju-Holics
item.description:
When: Dec 27 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting with Soju-Holics!

item.title: Store Closed – MERRY CHRISTMAS!
item.description:
When: Dec 25 12:00 AM - 11:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

We'll be closed for Christmas Day but open again on December 26th at our normal hours. Enjoy your holiday!

item.title: Free Tasting: Laurel Canyon Spirits
item.description:
When: Dec 19 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting with Laurel Canyon Spirits! We'll be trying their Cold Black Hjerte Coffee Liqueur.

item.title: Free Tasting: Green River Whiskey
item.description:
When: Dec 19 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting with Green River Whiskey!

item.title: Free Tasting: Aplos NA Spirits
item.description:
When: Dec 19 3:30 PM - 6:30 PM

Where: Long Beach

Aplos specializes in hemp infused NA spirit alternatives. Join us for a free sample of their delicious products!

item.title: Sip n' Shop
item.description:
When: Dec 14 2:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us at all three locations to Sip & Shop on 12/14 | 2-6PM 🎁 We’ve got a festive day filled with complimentary tastings, local vendors, gift with purchase, gift wrapping and more!!

item.title: Off Hours Whiskey Takeover
item.description:
When: Dec 13 2:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a festive day of Off Hours whiskey at all locations with a curated experience, including: a complimentary festive drink and gifts with purchase. • Culver City: SMPL Artisan Cheesecakes will be popping-up with yummy, fresh cheesecakes • Long Beach: Slowlines Art will be popping-up • Costa Mesa: Made by Mabel Ceramics will be popping-up

item.title: Free Tasting: St. Agrestis Phony Drinks & Kin Whiskey
item.description:
When: Dec 11 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a complimentary tasting of St. Agrestis Phony Drinks & Kin Whiskey!

item.title: Free Tasting: Simple Shots
item.description:
When: Dec 11 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Come sample the spirit based juice shot. Simple ingredients, all natural, made with real fruit.

item.title: Free Tasting: Dreyfus Ashby Wines
item.description:
When: Dec 10 3:30 PM - 6:30 PM

Where: Long Beach

Come taste your way through France with 3 wines from Campuget: 1753 Rose, Viognier & Syrah.

item.title: Free Tasting: Ogopogo Brewing
item.description:
When: Dec 7 3:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Deryk from Ogopogo Brewing in San Gabriel, California will be in store sampling beers! The beers are named for legendary creatures and figures from around the world, with the style of beer and ingredients used often linked through the country of origin.

item.title: Holiday Sip & Shop
item.description:
When: Dec 6 2:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a festive day at all Locations 2-6PM. We've got complimentary tastings and local vendors lined up for a festive day of shopping! We're here to make gift giving season extra special!

item.title: Free Tasting: Bardstown Whiskey
item.description:
When: Nov 28 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a complimentary tasting with Bardstown Bourbon!

item.title: Food Pop-up: Three Pigs LBC
item.description:
When: Nov 22 12:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Come by to enjoy Three Pigs LBC Japanese street food + yakitori!

item.title: Free Tasting: Long Beach Beer Lab
item.description:
When: Nov 20 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us with a complimentary with Long Beach Beer Lab~

item.title: Free Tasting: Mario's Hard Espresso
item.description:
When: Nov 19 3:30 PM - 6:30 PM

Where: Long Beach

Join us for a free tasting with Mario's Hard Espresso!
